examples.input: {"text": "eee , iz tega časa so ohranjena še razna železna orodja , tudi pri nas , grobišča in tudi gradišča , tako imenovana , na hribih .", "sent_len": 27, "treebank": "sl_sst", "modality": "spoken", "language": "Slovenian", "arc_stats": {"ARGUMENT": {"count": 1, "mdd": 4.0}, "ADJUNCT": {"count": 0, "mdd": null}, "MODIFIER": {"count": 8, "mdd": 2.625}}}

{"text": "zdaj , če pogledate še bolj natančno ta vzorec na vaški situli , mogoče tega pa res niste še nikoli pogledali .", "sent_len": 22, "treebank": "sl_sst", "modality": "spoken", "language": "Slovenian", "arc_stats": {"ARGUMENT": {"count": 2, "mdd": 5.5}, "ADJUNCT": {"count": 0, "mdd": null}, "MODIFIER": {"count": 10, "mdd": 2.7}}}

{"text": "bomo videli , če bo to potegnilo , ja .", "sent_len": 10, "treebank": "sl_sst", "modality": "spoken", "language": "Slovenian", "arc_stats": {"ARGUMENT": {"count": 2, "mdd": 3.0}, "ADJUNCT": {"count": 0, "mdd": null}, "MODIFIER": {"count": 0, "mdd": null}}}

{"text": "\"Tistega večera sem preveč popil, zgodilo se je mesec dni po tem, ko sem izvedel, da me žena vara.", "sent_len": 24, "treebank": "sl_ssj", "modality": "written", "language": "Slovenian", "arc_stats": {"ARGUMENT": {"count": 3, "mdd": 2.6667}, "ADJUNCT": {"count": 1, "mdd": 4.0}, "MODIFIER": {"count": 3, "mdd": 1.6667}}}

{"text": "Dogodek v Ankaranu je bila dramatična nesreča.", "sent_len": 8, "treebank": "sl_ssj", "modality": "written", "language": "Slovenian", "arc_stats": {"ARGUMENT": {"count": 1, "mdd": 6.0}, "ADJUNCT": {"count": 0, "mdd": null}, "MODIFIER": {"count": 2, "mdd": 1.5}}}

{"text": "Dekle je ob vzvratni vožnji začelo vpiti, da bi jo utišal, sem prijel nož.", "sent_len": 17, "treebank": "sl_ssj", "modality": "written", "language": "Slovenian", "arc_stats": {"ARGUMENT": {"count": 4, "mdd": 2.0}, "ADJUNCT": {"count": 1, "mdd": 3.0}, "MODIFIER": {"count": 1, "mdd": 1.0}}}

{"text": "euh, bon, pour aller du CRDT à la gare, euh, de Grenoble, je, euh, ben, je sors déjà du CRDT.", "sent_len": 31, "treebank": "fr_rhapsodie", "modality": "spoken", "language": "French", "arc_stats": {"ARGUMENT": {"count": 1, "mdd": 1.0}, "ADJUNCT": {"count": 1, "mdd": 20.0}, "MODIFIER": {"count": 2, "mdd": 3.0}}}

{"text": "je remonte, euh, l'avenue Général Champon.", "sent_len": 10, "treebank": "fr_rhapsodie", "modality": "spoken", "language": "French", "arc_stats": {"ARGUMENT": {"count": 2, "mdd": 3.0}, "ADJUNCT": {"count": 0, "mdd": null}, "MODIFIER": {"count": 1, "mdd": 1.0}}}

{"text": "je traverse, euh, face à la, euh, MDE.", "sent_len": 13, "treebank": "fr_rhapsodie", "modality": "spoken", "language": "French", "arc_stats": {"ARGUMENT": {"count": 1, "mdd": 1.0}, "ADJUNCT": {"count": 0, "mdd": null}, "MODIFIER": {"count": 1, "mdd": 6.0}}}

{"text": "Les commotions cérébrales sont devenu si courantes dans ce sport qu'on les considére presque comme la routine.", "sent_len": 19, "treebank": "fr_gsd", "modality": "written", "language": "French", "arc_stats": {"ARGUMENT": {"count": 6, "mdd": 3.3333}, "ADJUNCT": {"count": 0, "mdd": null}, "MODIFIER": {"count": 3, "mdd": 1.0}}}

{"text": "L'œuvre est située dans la galerie des batailles, dans le château de Versailles.", "sent_len": 17, "treebank": "fr_gsd", "modality": "written", "language": "French", "arc_stats": {"ARGUMENT": {"count": 1, "mdd": 2.0}, "ADJUNCT": {"count": 0, "mdd": null}, "MODIFIER": {"count": 2, "mdd": 2.5}}}

{"text": "Le comportement de la Turquie vis-à-vis du problème palestinien a fait qu'elle n'est plus en odeur de sainteté auprès de la communauté juive en générale, et américaine en particulier.", "sent_len": 34, "treebank": "fr_gsd", "modality": "written", "language": "French", "arc_stats": {"ARGUMENT": {"count": 3, "mdd": 7.3333}, "ADJUNCT": {"count": 0, "mdd": null}, "MODIFIER": {"count": 10, "mdd": 2.3}}}
